# session opener

## story

meta

## short-description

session-result-process-refinement

## basisc instructions

- read the whole opener to gather a deep understanding of the users goals
- analyze andcrawl the repo as needed to gather information about the project, its structure, and its current state 

## current problems

- the opener-format is too vague

 - a up.to.date complete, consistent description of the session-results-process is missing.

## my goals

1. develop am improved opener-format with agreed structure, that can be used for future sessions, to ensure a consistent and efficient process for future sessions. must be efficient for the ai and easy to for the user

2. I Want a complete an consistent description for the session-results-process, in two different formats
	a.) as an AI-Artfecat, maybe inergrated into your core copiltot-instructions.md, but may be better in a separate file, but always referenced in the copilot-instructions.md
	b.) a very good documentation for the human user. complete, consitent, stuctured, educational, communicable.

The md for the user shall be saved in C:\DevGit\Spielwiese\JOSYN\.github\.artifacts

## processing 

### 1. preparing

- get the context
- read the previous sessions in the meta-story
- understand the users goals and the current problems in the session-results-process
- paraphrase all before goinig on to processing
 
### 2. discussion

- develop together with the user a better opener-format with agreed structure
 
### 3. generation

- as described in the secion "my goals":
	- save an md for the user in C:\DevGit\Spielwiese\JOSYN\.github\.artifacts
	- save an ai-conform variant for yoursels in your internal instructions, for easy reference in future sessions

- finalize the session with a suummary over what was done
